description: This file is part of the Bootstrap framework, specifically handling DOM event registration, delegation, and triggering. It defines functions and a class for managing event listeners, including support for namespaced events and integration with jQuery.

methods.name: hydrateObj
methods.description: Augments an event object with additional metadata, ensuring properties are set even if they are non-writable.

methods.name: makeEventUid
methods.description: Generates a unique identifier for an event listener, associating it with an element or a provided UID.

methods.name: getElementEvents
methods.description: Retrieves or initializes the event registry for a specific DOM element.

methods.name: bootstrapHandler
methods.description: Wraps a handler function to include event hydration and one-off removal logic.

methods.name: bootstrapDelegationHandler
methods.description: Wraps a delegated event handler to handle event delegation based on a selector.

methods.name: findHandler
methods.description: Finds a registered event handler matching a specific callable and delegation selector.

methods.name: normalizeParameters
methods.description: Normalizes event handler parameters, determining if the handler is delegated and resolving the callable and event type.

methods.name: addHandler
methods.description: Registers an event handler on a DOM element, supporting delegation and custom event wrapping.

methods.name: removeHandler
methods.description: Removes a specific event handler from a DOM element.

methods.name: removeNamespacedHandlers
methods.description: Removes all event handlers within a specific namespace from an element.

methods.name: getTypeEvent
methods.description: Extracts the base event type from a namespaced event string.
